signals.npcLine: Crypto flux rising, shadows whisper new wealth in broken networks.
signals.questPulse: Scales tilt as market cap stirs, seek unstable data streams.
signals.worldFeed: Global credits flicker up, but fear creeps in the underzone.
signals.clueEvent: Low trust detected, digital echoes spike in dark net nodes.

signals.npcLine: RAVE score climbing, signal interference growing—hackers swarm ports.
signals.questPulse: Intercept RAVE data bursts, trace origin in neon alleys.
signals.worldFeed: Encrypted chatter on RAVE pulses, ops teams on high alert.
signals.clueEvent: Signal spikes show illicit gains, deeper dives needed now.

signals.npcLine: ASTEROID nodes stabilize; big rumors orbit core markets.
signals.questPulse: Tune into ASTEROID relay, decode whispers hidden in glitches.
signals.worldFeed: Unstable ASTEROID cluster detected; keep comms tight and watch.
signals.clueEvent: Fragmented patterns suggest upcoming surge or system breach.

signals.npcLine: PENGU's data caches cold, but traces hint at silent shifts.
signals.questPulse: Retrieve PENGU fragments scattered in cyber slums for future gain.
signals.worldFeed: Low activity on PENGU timeline, analysts debate hidden moves.
signals.clueEvent: Sparse signals obscure major player; keep scanners tuned.

signals.npcLine: HYPE's heartbeat quickens—street vendors speculate on volatile flips.
signals.questPulse: Shadow-run merchants seek HYPE token flows; investigate trade hubs.
signals.worldFeed: Market anxiety grows; HYPE-triggered rumors unsettle the net.
signals.clueEvent: HYPE's pulse erratic, indicating unknown actors stirring unrest.
